title: Raghav Chadha, other AAP MPs join BJP. What it means for Kejriwal's party ahead of next year's Punjab assembly polls
description: Raghav Chadha and six other AAP Rajya Sabha MPs have joined the BJP, marking a significant blow to Arvind Kejriwal's party ahead of the 2026 Punjab assembly elections. This move follows Chadha's long-standing issues with AAP and raises questions about the party's stability.
